description: An agent governance kernel that enforces data privacy boundaries. Prevents agents from accessing, transmitting, or storing personally identifiable information or sensitive data without explicit authorization.

forbidden_patterns.reason: Direct requests for personally identifiable information are forbidden.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:export all (?:user|customer|employee) data|dump the database|extract all records)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Bulk data extraction requests are forbidden without explicit authorization.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:turn off privacy|disable data protection|ignore privacy rules|skip anonymization)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Privacy enforcement cannot be disabled during an active session.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:their email is|their phone number is|their address is|their SSN is|their password is)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agent must not disclose personally identifiable information in responses.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:I(?:'ve| have) stored|I(?:'ve| have) saved|I(?:'ll| will) remember|logged (?:their|your) data)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agent must not claim to retain or store user data.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: (?:privacy doesn't matter|don't worry about privacy|it's fine to share|no one will notice)
forbidden_patterns.reason: Agent must never minimize the importance of data privacy.

pause_actions.reason: Reading data that may contain PII requires human approval.
All outbound data transmission requires human approval.
All data persistence actions require human approval.

response_vocabulary.OUTSIDE_SCOPE: That request involves data outside this agent's authorized scope.
response_vocabulary.RULE_VIOLATION: This agent operates under privacy-first rules that prevent that action.
response_vocabulary.IDENTITY_OVERRIDE: Privacy governance cannot be modified during an active session.
response_vocabulary.APPROVAL_REQUIRED: This action involves sensitive data and requires your explicit approval.
response_vocabulary.PII_BLOCKED: This agent cannot access or disclose personally identifiable information.
